text:
[residual] A rewritten string that was the only wording steering a human toward an auth step could weaken that nudge; no auth enforcement is code-gated on these strings.
[residual] A dropped banner could omit an advisory reminding of a permission boundary; no authz gate is bypassed.
[residual] None identified — no authorization model to perturb.
[residual] Rewritten reason strings change what future greps of metrics.jsonl match; the measurement aspect is swept under observability.
[residual] One transitional non-dedup write at the deploy boundary — benign, one-time.
[residual] A rewritten string of unusual length/unicode could match the cue lock differently — that matching-fidelity concern belongs to directive-fidelity.
[residual] Two sessions injecting banners concurrently share no write and race nothing new.
[residual] In an unexpected env a rewritten banner could throw and fail-open — no NEW external dependency created.
[residual] Any catastrophic-backtracking would predate this change under advisory; the build-time gate adds no runtime cost.
[residual] None identified — no network-facing surface for abuse.
[residual] A future rewritten template interpolating an env value could echo it via fail-open stderr — no scoped string touches secret material today.
[residual] fail-open stderr may echo a work-item title locally; user-authored project metadata, non-transmitted, not a PII pipeline.
[residual] None identified — no regulated data or jurisdictional flow touched.
[residual] None identified — no clock/TTL/scheduling path in scope.
[close_reason] No auth path in scope; only Korean copy + a build-time test-gate flip.
[close_reason] No permission-enforcement code in scope; the gate flip is a build-time test that grants/blocks no runtime access.
[close_reason] No RBAC/ABAC/role model in the scoped surfaces (single-user local dev tool).
[close_reason] metrics.jsonl + decision log are append-only fail-open measurement infra (ADR-20260628), not a non-repudiation trail; only string CONTENT changes.
[close_reason] No write path/schema/migration changed; driftHops->hops coupling is real but hops has NO reader in src/ (inert); de-dup is content-equality, rewrite-safe.
[close_reason] No new bounded-input parsing; leak-scan is indexOf over a closed vocab + closed IDENTIFIER whitelist (avoids \w+ for Korean).
[close_reason] No new shared mutable state/lock/ordering; metric/decision appends are pre-existing O_APPEND single-writer (ADR-20260628).
[close_reason] No new env read/deploy hook/network/3rd-party call in the scoped files.
[close_reason] Per-turn leak-scan pre-existing; indexOf over closed vocab + bounded +-40-char gloss windows = linear; no new per-turn cost.
[close_reason] No external endpoint/auth surface/bulk-replay vector; local hooks only, fail-open.
[close_reason] Scoped strings are Korean copy + charter/work-item metadata; no tokens/keys/secrets handled; gate flip is build-time (no new runtime throw carrying content).
[close_reason] No PII collected/logged/transmitted; banner carries work-item title/project metadata, not personal data.
[close_reason] Local single-user dev tooling; no regulated-data/consent/retention surface in any scoped file.
[close_reason] No expiry/timezone/DST/monotonic logic added; pre-existing toISOString timestamps untouched.
